reference: Hello Doctor, I am a nineteen-year-old male. I have a lump just underneath my cheekbone on the side of my face. The lump is about the size of a pea, maybe a bit bigger, as it is visible without manipulating the area. The lump is painless and doesn't seem to move like a lymph node does; it is also quite compact. I am really worried about this and have a doctor's appointment. Could it be cancerous?
text: Hello, doctor. I am a 19-year-old male. I have a lump just underneath my cheekbone on the side of my face. The lump is about the size of a pea, maybe a bit bigger, as it is visible without manipulating the area. The lump is painless and doesn't seem to move like a lymph node does. It is also quite compact. I am really worried about this and have a doctor's appointment. Could it be cancerous?
